textPlain: THIS IS MADNESS.Krieger, is that you? You went too far with it.I am all for catgirl holograms, so good science by Archer's Krieger on that. But SQL should not run Doom. The limits of science have been pushed beyond madness!Well okay, "does it run Doom" comes up here frequently.But why not solve "does it run catgirls" first, if you are a real-life mad scientist?

If you want to take a look at the source code, here's the repo!
https://github.com/cedardb/DOOMQL

This is a clever ad! I had not heard of them so I looked up the technology behind it: https://cedardb.com/docs/technology/A Postgresql-compatible HTAP. It appears to be single server and closed source. Roadmap: https://cedardb.com/docs/roadmap/
